item.title: Assessment of the Tax Implications of Electronic Cash Registers
item.description: Bajgar, M., Janský, P., Sůva, D., Šedivý, M., Škultéty, O. & Šoltés M. (2026). Vyhodnocení daňových dopadů elektronické evidence tržeb. Centrum veřejných financí.

item.title: Linked opacities: how fragmented transparency regimes undermine accountability in the extractive sector
item.description: Stausholm, S., Janský, P., & Šedivý, M. (2026). Linked opacities: how fragmented transparency regimes undermine accountability in the extractive sector. Critical Perspectives on Accounting, 104, 102875.

item.title: Intrahousehold Consumption Inequality over 24 Years: Evidence from Czechia
item.description: Šedivý M. (2025): Intrahousehold Consumption Inequality over 24 Years: Evidence from Czechia. IES Working Papers 24/2025. IES FSV. Charles University.

item.title: Life-cycle Consumption Expenditure and Inequality
item.description: Šedivý M. (2025): Life-cycle Consumption Expenditure and Inequality. IES Working Papers 25/2025. IES FSV. Charles University.

item.title: How do regional price levels affect income inequality? Household-level evidence from countries worldwide
item.description: Šedivý, M., & Janský, P. (2025). How do regional price levels affect income inequality? Household-level evidence from countries worldwide. The Annals of Regional Science, 74(1), 1-63.

item.title: VAT Changes: Impacts on Households and Public Budgets
item.description: Šedivý, M. & Zindulková K. (2025). Změny DPH: dopady na domácnosti a veřejné rozpočty. Centrum veřejných financí.

item.title: Who is Most Affected by Price Increases? Differences in Inflation for Different Types of Household, 2020-2023
item.description: Janský, P., Kolář, D., & Šedivý, M. (2023). Kdo je nejvíce zasažen růstem cen?: rozdíly v inflaci pro různé domácnosti 2020-2023. Národohospodářský ústav AV ČR, vvi.

item.title: Mortality shocks and household consumption: the case of Mexico
item.description: Šedivý, M. (2023). Mortality shocks and household consumption: the case of Mexico. Review of Economics of the Household, 21(4), 1289-1358.

item.title: How Many of Us Can Work from Home? Evidence for the Czech Republic
item.description: Bajgar, M., Janský, P., & Šedivý, M. (2021). How Many of Us Can Work from Home? Evidence for the Czech Republic. Politická ekonomie, 69(5), 555-570. doi: 10.18267/j.polek.1329

item.title: How many of us can work from home?
item.description: Bajgar, M., Janský, P., & Šedivý, M. (2020). Kolik nás může pracovat z domova?. Národohospodářský ústav AV ČR, vvi.

item.title: Estimating the revenue costs of tax treaties in developing countries
item.description: Janský, P., & Šedivý, M. (2019). Estimating the revenue costs of tax treaties in developing countries. The World Economy, 42(6), 1828-1849.
